query: SELECT id, name, price, status, createdAt FROM products WHERE name NOT LIKE '%Test%' AND status != 'deleted' ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Pzq3FY2vhR4CL9.root --database 8Wwg5mRcrYyNGMcAgK6gn2 --execute SELECT id, name, price, status, createdAt FROM products WHERE name NOT LIKE '%Test%' AND status != 'deleted' ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
